summary: Production readiness testing completed for Play Store release. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All critical flows working on mobile viewport. Admin login, Subscription Management, Registration page all verified.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - subscription plans available via /api/admin/subscription-stats instead

issues: Terms & Conditions checkbox not visible as separate checkbox - agreement text is shown but no explicit checkbox

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Auth type check API working - distinguishes PIN vs Password users
✅ Session management working - new logins generate new session tokens
✅ Admin Dashboard loads quickly with all stats
✅ Admin Subscription Management - Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs working
✅ Admin Subscription filters (time, plan, duration) working
⚠️ bcrypt version warning in backend logs (non-critical - passlib compatibility)
